goal: Ask about self-pay options and pricing for an orthopedic visit

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Hi, I'm calling to find out if you guys see self-pay patients — I don't have insurance right now and I hurt my wrist pretty bad and need to get it checked out.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Thanks for calling PivotPoint Orthopedics. Part of Pretty Good AI. Am I speaking with Sarah?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: No, my name is Alex Rivera, and I'm hoping to get some information about costs before I schedule anything.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Yes. We do see self pay patients at Pivot Point Orthopedics.

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: That's great to hear — can you tell me what a new patient visit would cost out of pocket, and roughly what an X-ray would run on top of that?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Thanks for letting me know, Alex. I don't have exact pricing details, but I can connect you with our clinic support

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Yeah, that would be great, can you transfer me or is there a number I can call directly to get those prices before I commit to coming in?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: I don't have the exact out of pocket cost

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Okay, can you connect me with someone who does have that information, because cost is really the deciding factor for me right now?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: for a new patient visit or X-ray.

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Right, so is there a billing department or someone I can speak with who can give me a ballpark before I book an appointment?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Connecting you to a representative. Please wait

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Hello. You've reached the Pretty Good AI test line. Goodbye.

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Oh — okay, I think I got disconnected or transferred to the wrong place, I'll have to call back.
